arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano: Liverpool and Chelsea eyeing Dutch pair
arts.sum: According to Fabrizio Romano (via VP) both Jorrel Hato and Dean Huijsen are being closely monitored by several top clubs in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: How to watch Liverpool vs Newcastle United - TV channel, stream, kick-off time
arts.sum: Midweek Premier League is back this week, with all 20 teams in action including Liverpool v Newcastle and Nottingham Forest v Arsenal. Newcastle United return to Premier League action on Wednesday night as they travel to face league leaders Liverpool at Anfield.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot and Virgil van Dijk send title message to supporters before huge Newcastle clash
arts.sum: The head coach and captain have called on the supporters to raise the roof at Anfield on Wednesday night

arts.ttl: ‘Every time I see him’: David Seaman says what keeps changing about Mo Salah every time he watches him
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is undoubtedly the best player in the Premier League right now. Salah is in Ballon d’Or winning form at Liverpool right now, and...

arts.ttl: James Pearce: Summer Exit for ‘World-Class’ Liverpool Star ‘Increasingly Likely’
arts.sum: According to The Athletic's James Pearce, this Liverpool star is likely to depart Anfield in the coming summer transfer window.

arts.ttl: Liverpool 2nd, Fenerbahce 6th - Which clubs have the best attacking trios this season?

arts.ttl: Liverpool ready to set 'huge amount of money aside' for transfer after financial boost
arts.sum: With the futures of Mo Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold still up in the air, Liverpool are making plans for a blockbuster summer transfer window

arts.ttl: Old tweet from Liverpool stand-in boss emerges ahead of crucial Newcastle clash - with Reds coach set to step into the dugout after Arne Slot's ban
arts.sum: Heitinga will lead Liverpool for their clash against Newcastle on Wednesday after both Arne Slot and assistant Sipke Hulshoff were handed two-match touchline bans.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United summer transfer boost emerges just hours before Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Liverpool will seemingly face fresh competition from Newcastle United in the summer transfer window should tonight's opponents qualify for the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Late change for Liverpool vs Newcastle confirmed that could annoy Arne Slot
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool news as the Reds take on Newcastle United in the Premier League on Tuesday night as they look to increase their advantage at the top of the table.
